texto: who did I think we were.who did I thinkI could make you.this is the oldest mistake,to confuse wantingwith magic. silence is the undoingof every spell, and we are expertsin the unsaid. even now, I forgetto put us in past tense. as ifthe air in this city were the same.as if love is anything like its speaking.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Marty McConnell Emily Kagan Trenchard: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “who did I think we were.who did I thinkI could make you.this is the oldest mistake,to confuse wan…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, magic, mistake pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e termino.
